phrases.intent_en: Ask which bay for Pamukkale to Denizli
phrases.text_local: Pamukkale firmasının Denizli peronu kaç numara?
phrases.cultural_note: Peron numaraları firmaya göre değişebilir; danışma en güvenli yönlendirmeyi yapar.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if Metro Turizm has overnight to Istanbul
phrases.text_local: Metro Turizm'in İstanbul'a gece seferi var mı?
phrases.cultural_note: Overnight bus services are common in Turkey, but schedules vary; staff will direct you to the company desk for exact information.

likely_response.translation_en: Yes, there is one every night.

responses.english: Yes, there is one every night.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if dolmuş to Kayaköy accepts card
phrases.text_local: Kayaköy dolmuşu kredi kartı geçerli mi?
phrases.cultural_note: Dolmuşlarda ödeme yöntemi değişebilir; danışma veya şoför güncel bilgiyi verir.

phrases.intent_en: Ask which bay for Pamukkale to Denizli
phrases.text_local: Denizli'ye Pamukkale ile gideceğim, hangi peron?
phrases.cultural_note: In Turkish bus stations, bay assignments can change; staff often direct you to the information desk rather than guessing.

phrases.intent_en: Ask if dolmuş to Kayaköy accepts card
phrases.cultural_note: Dolmuş drivers in Turkey typically prefer cash, but policies can vary; staff can give you the most accurate information.

phrases.intent_en: Ask where çay ocağı is inside station
phrases.cultural_note: Çay ocakları are common in Turkish bus stations, but their exact location within the station can vary.

likely_response.translation_en: At the beginning of the platforms.

responses.english: At the beginning of the platforms.
